basic_details.job_title: Maharaja Agrasen College Consultant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: Maharaja Agrasen College Consultant (Section Officer) Notification 2026 has been released on the official website. A total of 01 vacancy has been announced through the Maharaja Agrasen College Consultant (Section Officer) Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: Retired from Section Officer / Administrative Officer / equivalent post, Experience in Administration matters, Service matters, Office procedures, Recruitment and pension matters, Drafting/noting and correspondence, University/Government rules and regulations, RTI related matters, Good knowledge of computer applications such as MS Office, e-Office, email handling
qualification.details: Retired from Section Officer / Administrative Officer / equivalent post from Central Government/State Government/Autonomous Bodies/Universities/University of Delhi Colleges/PSUs with experience in Administration matters, Service matters, Office procedures, Recruitment and pension matters, Drafting/noting and correspondence, University/Government rules and regulations, RTI related matters and good knowledge of computer applications such as MS Office, e-Office, email handling.

selection_process: Scrutiny of applications Experience and suitability Interaction/Interview if required
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for Maharaja Agrasen College Consultant (Section Officer) Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 06-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for Maharaja Agrasen College Consultant (Section Officer) Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website: . Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 06-07-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Maharaja Agrasen College Consultant (Section Officer) recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the Consultant (Section Officer) post is 06-07-2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Consultant (Section Officer) post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Consultant (Section Officer) position at Maharaja Agrasen College.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is offline. Candidates need to send their application form to the official address.

faq.question: Q4. What is the maximum age limit for the Consultant (Section Officer) post?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Consultant (Section Officer) post is 62 years.

faq.question: Q5. What are the essential qualifications for the Consultant (Section Officer) role?
faq.answer: Candidates must be retired Section Officers or equivalent with experience in administration, service matters, office procedures, and computer applications.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q7. What is the job type for the Consultant (Section Officer) position?
faq.answer: The job type for the Consultant (Section Officer) position is contract-based.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process involves scrutiny of applications, assessment of experience and suitability, and an interaction/interview if deemed necessary.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section of this article.

faq.question: Q10. What is the location of Maharaja Agrasen College?
faq.answer: Maharaja Agrasen College is located in Delhi, with the pincode 110096.
